title: Dementia care planning documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports flexible or prescheduled monitoring, review of emerging needs, a named coordinator, and documented care and support planning.
assessment.rationale: The exact monitoring and coordination section supports needs assessment, family or carer involvement, emerging needs, named coordination, support planning and reviewed records without creating a care plan.

source.title: Dementia: assessment, management and support for people living with dementia and their carers
source.population: Adults with suspected or diagnosed dementia and their carers.
source.setting: Initial assessment, specialist assessment, ongoing care coordination, and support.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult memory and cognitive concern assessment and support; partial for undifferentiated memory symptoms and not directly validated for UAE referral, driving, or social-care pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.2.34–1.2.35 and 1.3.1–1.3.2 — monitoring, coordination, and support plans

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports flexible or prescheduled monitoring, review of emerging needs, a named coordinator, and documented care and support planning.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-documented driving information and review of carer information, assessment, education, and support needs.
assessment.rationale: The exact section supports clinician-documented driving and carer-support discussions plus questions without generating legal or service advice.
